name: charter
description: AI-assisted project discipline plugin. Enforces session-to-session continuity through living docs and lightweight rituals layered on top of superpowers.

plugins.name: charter
plugins.description: Charter enforces session-to-session continuity for AI-assisted development. Scaffolds living docs (VISION/STATUS/ARCHITECTURE) into any project, orients Claude at session start, classifies every request by size and applies matching ritual depth, and enforces finish rituals. Requires superpowers.
